opinion.p: UNITED STATES, Appellant, v. EDWARD G. PIERSON. No. 40.
Supreme Court of the United States
The Attorney General and Solicitor General Hoyt for appellant.
Messrs. Geo. A. King and William B. King for appellee.
Dismissed, on motion of Mr. Solicitor General Hoyt for the appellant.[ U S v. Pierson 191 U.S. 562 (1903) ]
